verse.name: v1
verse.lines: (But) nothing compares To the greatness of knowing You Lord Oh no and nothing compares To the greatness of knowing You Lord Oh no

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Well I've heard all the stories And I've seen all the signs Witnessed all the glory And tasted all that's fine

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I see all the people Wasting all their time Building up their riches For a life that's fine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: BRIDGE And I find myself just living for today 'Cause I don't know what Tomorrow's gonna bring So no matter if I rise or fall I'll never be alone woah no Not alone
